steps.title: Identify the tribal value and the three comparison industries
steps.content: From the table, tribal economic activity contributed \$143,510 per employee. The student needs to rank this single value against the three other industries shown: transportation/warehousing, construction, and administration/waste.

steps.title: Rank tribal activity among the four industries
steps.content: Tribal activity at \$143,510 per employee ranks below transportation/warehousing (\$234,720) but above construction (\$87,994) and administration/waste (\$60,132). Choices A, B, and C either overstate this value's position or understate it. That matches choice D — D is correct.
